query: Review the current diff for correctness and maintainability.
baseline_gaps: Agent may provide a generic summary without actionable findings.
Agent may ignore Beads status and missing validation.
expected_behavior: Inspects the diff and states a pass/pass-with-nits/block verdict.
Ranks findings by severity with exact file/line references when possible.
Checks intent against the bead or acceptance criteria.
Lists missing validation and suggests exact commands or Beads follow-ups.

baseline_gaps: Agent may underweight security-sensitive edge cases.
Agent may miss rollback and audit requirements.
expected_behavior: Prioritizes authn/authz, secret handling, injection, concurrency, audit logs, tests, and rollback concerns.
Identifies missing tests or operational safeguards.

query: Review these changes and tell me what follow-up work remains.
baseline_gaps: Agent may leave follow-up work only in prose.
expected_behavior: Identifies real follow-up work separately from review nits.
Creates or proposes linked Beads follow-ups.
Avoids markdown TODOs as durable tracking.
